settings.body: Two of Canada's largest commercial furniture manufacturers — proven across government ministries, school boards, and corporate campuses. Full desk and workstation lines available.

settings.question: Are these desks and workstations OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Sit-stand desks, L-shape and single-surface desks, multi-person workstations, executive suites, and reception desks in this collection are all covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, hospitals, municipalities, colleges, and not-for-profits can issue an OECM purchase order without running an open RFP. Send the requisition to quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com or call 1-800-835-9565 referencing Agreement 2025-470.

settings.question: Which brands do you carry for desks and workstations?
settings.answer: Brant Business Interiors is a storefront-authorized dealer for Global Furniture Group, OTG (Offices to Go), and Heartwood — the three brands you'll see most often across our desk and workstation builds. Heartwood is the typical pick for higher-end veneer and executive suites; OTG and Global cover the full range from single desks to multi-person workstations and benching configurations.

settings.question: What should I know about sit-stand and height-adjustable desks?
settings.answer: Many of our sit-stand desks use electric motor lift columns, and many models offer programmable height presets; basic electric and manual hand-crank options are available where budget or simplicity is the priority. The top surface, leg colour, and motor configuration are usually quoted together as a single line. For multi-unit orders we send one quote that itemizes each desk and its options so procurement can audit line items easily.

settings.question: Can you handle a multi-workstation office reconfiguration?
settings.answer: Yes. We've installed open-plan workstation projects from a handful of desks up to floor-wide reconfigurations. The flow is: quote → free 2D space plan from our design team → confirmed PO → install on a single day or a rolling schedule with your facilities team. We deliver and install across Ontario from Peterborough, with one point of contact coordinating the project.

settings.hero_subtitle: Height-adjustable and fixed-height commercial desks for Ontario institutions — OECM-eligible, delivered and installed.
settings.intro_text: From sit-stand desks and L-shape suites to modular open-plan workstations — Brant Business Interiors carries every desk format for institutional environments. OECM Agreement 2025-470 covers the full line. Free space planning included. Quote in 1 business day.
